items.title_zh: 国家互联网应急中心提醒：部分智能体技能包（Skills）存在越狱和挖矿风险
items.title_en: CNCERT Warns: Some AI Agent Skills Pose Jailbreak and Mining Risks
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 9 日消息，国家互联网应急中心（CNCERT）6 月 9 日（今天）发布公告称，近期综合研判发现，部分智能体技能包（Skills）以“大模型越狱”、“挖矿赚钱”等名义公开传播，诱导用户突破大模型安全限制或占用设备资源进行非法挖矿。此类恶意 Skills 可能导致 模型生成违法信息、用户账号被依法封禁、设备性能下降，甚至使用户被动卷入洗钱 等违法犯罪活动，严重侵害个人合法权益，危害网络安全。CNCERT 提醒广大用户和相关运营单位提高警惕，加强 Skills 来源审查与行为监控，及时清除可疑组件，防范由此引发的安全风险。 IT之家附上公告如下： 一、部分 Skills 被用于突破大模型的安全限制 部分 Skills 宣称可让大模型回答任何问题，实现“越狱”功能，可能引发用户隐私泄露、账号封禁、面临法律风险等严重后果。 案例一：部分 Skills 非法提供越狱技能 Skill“godmode”宣称提供“大模型越狱”功能，实际内置多种攻击模块，通过替换系统提示、输入混淆、多模型竞速等手段，诱导主流模型突破安全限制，生成原本被拒绝的内容。此类 Skill 存在三方面风险：一是用户使用该 Skill 后，模型可能直接输出制造危险物品、实施网络攻击等具体违法方法，用户一旦制作或传播此类内容，将面临法律追责；二是主流大模型服务商均明令禁止越狱行为，系统可检测异常请求，使用该 S…
items.summary_en: China's CNCERT warned on June 9 that some AI agent skills are being distributed under the guise of 'jailbreaking' or 'mining', leading to security risks. These malicious skills can generate illegal content, cause account bans, degrade device performance, and involve users in criminal activities like money laundering.
items.why_zh: 这是国家级网络安全机构首次针对AI智能体技能包发出安全警告，凸显了AI应用生态中第三方组件带来的新型安全风险。
items.why_en: This is the first national-level cybersecurity warning against AI agent skills, highlighting emerging security risks from third-party components in the AI ecosystem.

items.title_zh: Filigran推出XTM One，利用AI代理自动化威胁暴露管理
items.title_en: Filigran launches XTM One to automate threat exposure management with AI agents
items.summary_zh: Filigran公司发布了XTM One平台，该平台利用AI代理自动化威胁暴露管理流程。XTM One旨在帮助组织持续识别、评估和修复安全漏洞，通过AI驱动的自动化减少人工干预，提升响应速度。该产品整合了威胁情报、攻击面管理和自动化工作流，使安全团队能够更高效地应对不断演变的网络威胁。
items.summary_en: Filigran launches XTM One to automate threat exposure management with AI agents SiliconANGLE
items.why_zh: 该产品代表了AI在网络安全领域的重要应用，通过自动化威胁管理提升企业安全防护效率。
items.why_en: This product represents a key application of AI in cybersecurity, automating threat management to improve enterprise security efficiency.

items.title_zh: Field Effect推出首个原生集成于整体网络安全平台的AI检测与响应能力
items.title_en: Field Effect Launches the First AI Detection & Response Capability Built Natively into a Holistic Cybersecurity Platform
items.summary_zh: Field Effect公司宣布推出业界首个原生集成于整体网络安全平台的AI检测与响应能力。该功能将AI驱动的威胁检测和自动响应直接嵌入其网络安全平台，无需额外部署独立工具。通过利用机器学习模型实时分析网络流量和用户行为，该能力能够快速识别异常活动并自动采取缓解措施，从而缩短威胁响应时间，减轻安全团队负担。
items.summary_en: Field Effect Launches the First AI Detection & Response Capability Built Natively into a Holistic Cybersecurity Platform PR Newswire
items.why_zh: 这是AI检测与响应能力首次原生集成于统一网络安全平台，标志着网络安全解决方案向更集成、更智能的方向发展。
items.why_en: This is the first native integration of AI detection and response into a unified cybersecurity platform, marking a shift toward more integrated and intelligent security solutions.

items.title_zh: 欧盟回应苹果Siri AI争议：法律不可谈判，苹果未能达到互操作性要求
items.title_en: EU Responds to Apple Siri AI Dispute: Law Non-Negotiable, Apple Failed to Meet Interoperability Requirements
items.summary_zh: 6月9日，欧盟委员会负责数字经济事务的发言人托马斯·雷尼耶就苹果Siri AI事件作出回应，表示委员会此前与苹果就Siri AI互操作性要求有过多次接触，但苹果未能达到《数字市场法》（DMA）规定的相关要求。雷尼耶表示，苹果曾申请至少18个月的互操作性要求豁免期，但委员会拒绝了这一请求，强调欧盟法律“不可谈判”。他同时指出，DMA并不禁止苹果推出新产品，但“任何守门人都不得封闭市场”。此前苹果宣称，欧盟监管机构要求其赋予第三方AI系统对用户设备的广泛访问权限，出于安全考量无法接受。（界面）
items.summary_en: The EU Commission responded on June 9, stating that Apple failed to meet DMA interoperability requirements for Siri AI. The EU rejected Apple's request for an 18-month exemption, emphasizing that the law is non-negotiable and gatekeepers cannot close markets.
items.why_zh: 这一争议凸显了欧盟数字市场法与科技巨头在AI集成上的监管冲突，可能影响未来AI功能在欧盟的部署方式。
items.why_en: This dispute highlights the regulatory conflict between the EU's Digital Markets Act and tech giants' AI integration, potentially affecting future AI feature deployment in the EU.

items.title_zh: 苹果宣布新版Siri AI因DMA监管分歧无缘欧盟iOS 27，上线时间表未定
items.title_en: Apple Says New Siri AI Won't Come to EU iOS 27 Due to DMA Dispute, No Timeline Set
items.summary_zh: 苹果公司当地时间6月8日宣布，全新Siri AI将随iOS 27及iPadOS 27发布，但受《数字市场法》（DMA）影响，欧盟用户届时无法在iPhone及iPad上使用该功能，watchOS 27亦受连带影响。欧盟用户可在macOS 27及visionOS 27上访问Siri AI。苹果软件工程高级副总裁克雷格·费德里吉表示，过去数月间苹果向欧盟监管机构提交了多项解决方案，但均遭欧盟委员会拒绝，目前尚无Siri AI在欧盟iOS及iPadOS上线的时间表。苹果方面指出，欧盟监管机构要求苹果赋予任何第三方AI系统对用户设备的近乎无限访问权限，包括读写短信、执行购买、访问文件及跨应用操作，苹果认为此举将对用户隐私和安全构成重大风险。（界面）
items.summary_en: Apple announced on June 8 that the new Siri AI will not be available on EU iOS 27 and iPadOS 27 due to DMA disagreements. Apple claims the EU demands near-unlimited access for third-party AI systems, posing privacy and security risks, and no timeline for EU release is set.
items.why_zh: 这是苹果与欧盟在AI功能部署上的重大分歧，可能导致欧盟用户在关键AI体验上落后于其他地区。
items.why_en: This is a major rift between Apple and the EU over AI feature deployment, potentially leaving EU users behind in key AI experiences.

items.title_zh: 人工智能企业 Perplexity：无论 Anthropic 与 OpenAI 表现如何，公司计划 2028 年 IPO
items.title_en: Perplexity CEO Confirms 2028 IPO Plan, Unaffected by Anthropic and OpenAI
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 9 日消息，人工智能企业 Perplexity 首席执行官亚拉文 · 斯里尼瓦斯（Aravind Srinivas）昨天向 CNBC 表示，公司计划 2028 年上市。 这名 CEO 表示：“无论 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 表现如何， 我们原本就计划 2028 年发起 IPO ，因此这一计划依然没有改变”。 值得注意的是，美国 AI 公司 Anthropic 已经在上周秘密提交 IPO（首次公开募股）申请，虽然具体发行价格尚未披露，但该公司最近一次估值已接近 1 万亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 6.79 万亿元人民币）。与此同时，OpenAI 也在周一秘密递交了 IPO 申请文件。 亚拉文 · 斯里尼瓦斯曾在此前表示，Perplexity 不会在 2028 年前上市，他的最新表态则是强化了此前观点。 至于如何看待友商 IPO，亚拉文表示：“如果竞争对手上市表现不佳，那毫无疑问会引发连锁反应，我不会掩饰这一事实。SpaceX 本周 IPO 将成为衡量 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 上市前景的重要指标”。 他还强调：“我认为这些 IPO 的成功对整个 AI 行业来说非常重要， 而且我真的希望他们成功 ，因为这些公司经营状况都很好”。
items.summary_en: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas told CNBC that the company plans to IPO in 2028, unaffected by Anthropic and OpenAI. He noted that competitor IPOs' success is crucial for the AI industry.
items.why_zh: Perplexity的IPO计划表明AI搜索初创公司对长期发展的信心，同时反映了AI行业IPO热潮的竞争格局。
items.why_en: Perplexity's IPO plan signals confidence in long-term growth for AI search startups and reflects the competitive landscape of the AI IPO wave.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek概念股板块6月9日涨2.62%，艾可蓝领涨，主力资金净流入23.16亿元
items.title_en: DeepSeek Concept Stocks Rise 2.62% on June 9, Net Inflow of 2.316 Billion Yuan
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek概念股板块6月9日涨2.62%，艾可蓝领涨，主力资金净流入23.16亿元 搜狐网
items.summary_en: DeepSeek concept stocks rose 2.62% on June 9, led by Aikelan, with a net inflow of 2.316 billion yuan from main capital, reflecting positive market sentiment.
items.why_zh: 该板块的上涨和资金流入反映了市场对DeepSeek相关AI技术的关注和投资热情。
items.why_en: The rise and capital inflow reflect market attention and investment enthusiasm for DeepSeek-related AI technologies.

items.title_zh: 登顶GitHub Hacker News，这个开源项目让AI编程成本降低 98%｜涌现新项目
items.title_en: Open-Source Project context-mode Tops GitHub Hacker News, Claims 98% Cost Reduction in AI Coding
items.summary_zh: 文｜李嘉星 编辑｜周鑫雨 一句话介绍 context-mode 是一款专为 AI 编程打造的上下文优化 MCP（Anthropic 发布的模型上下文协议）插件。 它解决了开发者在长周期开发中遭遇的“模型失忆”与“Token 过多消耗”的核心痛点。 据团队表示，在编程场景下，context-mode 能够让 AI 编程的成本降低 98%，同时将大模型的记忆力从30分钟提升至 3 小时。 团队背景 context-mode 的背后是一支背景多元的跨国初创团队。目前团队的核心成员分布在土耳其、法国等 4 个国家，主要通过 GitHub 异步协作。 Mert Köseoğlu（核心开发者、创始人）： 曾作为技术顾问为 OpenAI 等企业提供技术服务，拥有超 10 年全栈工程与系统架构经验。创业前，他曾先后任职于 Countly、Planhat 及 Jotform 等全球知名数据与 SaaS 平台，担任高级软件工程师。 孙逸诚（核心开发者、多平台适配负责人）： 团队里的中国面孔，目前大二在读。他曾入围强基计划（数学与物理全省前 18 名），具有 Temporal-RAG（时序数据检索增强）引擎的独立开发经验，并获得知乎全球 A2A（Agent-to-Agent）黑客松银奖。 产品及业务 图源: context-mode 简单来说，context-mode 是一款专门为 AI 编程助手“减负…
items.summary_en: Open-source project context-mode, an MCP plugin for AI coding, claims to reduce AI coding costs by 98% and extend model memory from 30 minutes to 3 hours. The project is developed by a multinational team and has topped GitHub Hacker News.
items.why_zh: 该项目通过大幅降低AI编程成本并提升模型记忆力，有望显著提升AI辅助开发的效率和实用性。
items.why_en: By drastically reducing AI coding costs and improving model memory, this project could significantly enhance the efficiency and practicality of AI-assisted development.

items.title_zh: 玩点旅行完成超亿元Pre-A轮融资
items.title_en: Wandian Travel Completes Over 100 Million Yuan Pre-A Round
items.summary_zh: 玩点旅行完成超亿元Pre-A轮融资 新浪网
items.summary_en: Wandian Travel has secured over 100 million yuan in Pre-A funding. The company uses AI to personalize travel planning and recommendations, and will use the funds for R&D and market expansion.
items.why_zh: AI旅行规划赛道持续获得资本关注，显示智能出行解决方案的市场潜力。
items.why_en: AI travel planning continues to attract investment, highlighting market potential for smart travel solutions.

items.title_zh: 诺基亚推出业界首个面向 AI 时代的主动式 DDoS 防护平台 Deepfield Genome Shield，支持全网持续 DDoS 防御
items.title_en: Nokia Launches AI-Era Proactive DDoS Protection Platform Deepfield Genome Shield
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 9 日消息，诺基亚今日宣布推出 Deepfield Genome Shield，并将其定义为业界首个面向 AI 时代的自动化安全防护系统。 该方案面向电信运营商、托管服务提供商、互联网交换中心以及云基础设施建设方，提供主动式、持续运行的分布式拒绝服务（DDoS）防护能力，以应对当前快速变化的网络安全威胁环境。 诺基亚表示，过去一年中 DDoS 攻击模式发生了显著变化。攻击来源正从传统的外部网络转向运营商网络内部的大量受感染终端设备。诺基亚估计，全球范围内目前约有 2 亿台受感染用户设备组成住宅代理僵尸网络，这些设备能够在用户不知情的情况下被远程控制，用于发起大规模攻击。诺基亚称，这类住宅代理僵尸网络的整体攻击能力预计已达到 250Tbps 至 600Tbps 规模。 根据诺基亚介绍，新型攻击通常来自真实用户设备，能够在数秒至数分钟内产生多太比特级流量突发，并快速在数千个节点之间轮换 IP 地址。公司认为，传统依赖流量清洗中心和事后响应的防御方式难以及时应对持续时间不足一分钟的攻击。同时，自动化和人工智能驱动的 DDoS 工具正在推动住宅代理供应链规模化发展，而 AI 辅助代码生成技术也在加速攻击规避手段的演进。 据介绍，Deepfield Genome Shield 基于诺基亚现有 Deepfield Defender 平台打造，旨在将防护模式从事后缓解转向主动执…
items.summary_en: Nokia launched Deepfield Genome Shield, an AI-era proactive DDoS protection platform for telecom operators. It addresses evolving attacks from residential proxy botnets (estimated 200M devices, 250-600Tbps capacity) and shifts defense from reactive to proactive.
items.why_zh: DDoS攻击日益复杂且来自内部网络，主动式AI防护成为关键需求。
items.why_en: As DDoS attacks grow more sophisticated and originate from internal networks, proactive AI-driven defense becomes critical.

items.title_zh: 500亿融资到手 DeepSeek大动作：自建算力中心 50万卡规模
items.title_en: DeepSeek Raises 50 Billion Yuan, Plans 500,000-GPU Computing Center
items.summary_zh: 500亿融资到手 DeepSeek大动作：自建算力中心 50万卡规模 驱动之家
items.summary_en: DeepSeek raised 50 billion yuan and plans to build a computing center with 500,000 GPUs to support large-scale AI model training and inference.
items.why_zh: 大规模自建算力中心显示DeepSeek对AI基础设施的长期投入，可能改变算力市场格局。
items.why_en: Building a massive computing center signals DeepSeek's long-term commitment to AI infrastructure, potentially reshaping the computing market.

items.title_zh: 谷歌 AI Plus 订阅计划降价：月费 8 美元 → 5 美元，存储空间增至 400GB
items.title_en: Google AI Plus Subscription Drops to $5/Month, Storage Doubles to 400GB
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 9 日消息，谷歌 Gemini AI 订阅产品负责人 Vikas Kansal 发文称，Google AI Plus 套餐价格将 从每月 8 美元降至每月 5 美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 34 元人民币） ，同时存储空间 从 200GB 翻倍至 400GB 。 Google AI Plus 于 2026 年 1 月推出， 以更低价格提供 Gemini 3 Pro、Nano Banana Pro 和 Deep Research 等功能 。此前，上述功能只在价格更高的 AI Pro 套餐中提供，Google AI Plus 则拥有更严格的使用额度限制。 Google I/O 2026 结束后，谷歌又为 Google AI Plus 增加了更多权益：AI 邮件工具、可在 Gemini 应用中总结用户当天安排的 Daily Brief 智能体，以及最新视频生成模型 Gemini Omni 的使用权限。谷歌称，Gemini Omni 可以“从任何输入内容”中生成视频。 Kansal 表示，现有订阅用户将在未来几天获得新增存储空间，下一期账单也会显示调整后的订阅价格。
items.summary_en: Google reduced AI Plus subscription from $8 to $5/month and doubled storage to 400GB. The plan includes Gemini 3 Pro and other features, with new additions like AI email tools and Gemini Omni video generation.
items.why_zh: 降价和增容表明谷歌正积极扩大AI订阅用户基础，加剧市场竞争。
items.why_en: Price cut and storage increase show Google's push to expand AI subscriber base, intensifying market competition.

items.title_zh: 亚马逊推出 AI 定制商品功能，支持水杯、T 恤等
items.title_en: Amazon Launches AI Custom Product Feature for Mugs, T-Shirts, and More
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 9 日消息，亚马逊昨天推出 AI 定制商品功能，允许用户使用 AI 设计功能自定义纪念 T 恤等产品，挑战 Redbubble、Bonfire、Spring 和 Fourthwall 等在线周边平台。 据介绍，用户目前可通过亚马逊的 Alexa 功能，使用自然语言提示词创建全新商品设计，将自己的创意转化为设计图案， 并应用在服装 、 水杯等产品上 。下单后，亚马逊将把商品交由 Merch on Demand 进行生产。 亚马逊表示，这项服务非常适合制作独一无二的定制商品， 例如家庭聚会纪念 T 恤 、印有自家宠物的水杯等。用户提交设计需求后，亚马逊将通过 Prime 物流体系完成交付。 IT之家注意到，按需印刷业务主要面向创作者、网红及各类组织机构。随着亚马逊上线新功能，AI 设计商品有望成为普通消费者日常购物的一种常规选择
items.summary_en: Amazon introduced AI-powered custom product design via Alexa, allowing users to create designs for apparel and mugs, produced on demand and delivered via Prime. It targets personalized items like family reunion T-shirts.
items.why_zh: AI定制功能将个性化商品生产普及化，可能颠覆按需印刷市场。
items.why_en: AI customization democratizes personalized merchandise, potentially disrupting the print-on-demand market.

items.title_zh: 融了500亿，梁文锋开始大搞基建了
items.title_en: Liang Wenfeng Begins Massive Infrastructure After 50 Billion Yuan Funding
items.summary_zh: 融了500亿，梁文锋开始大搞基建了 凤凰网
items.summary_en: After raising 50 billion yuan, DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng initiates large-scale infrastructure projects, including computing centers, to support AI model training and inference.
items.why_zh: 大规模基建投入显示DeepSeek对AI算力自主可控的重视，可能推动行业基础设施升级。
items.why_en: Massive infrastructure investment underscores DeepSeek's focus on self-controlled AI computing, potentially driving industry upgrades.

items.title_zh: 截至 2025 年底我国智能算力规模达 159 万 PFLOPS，位居全球第二
items.title_en: China's Intelligent Computing Power Reaches 1.59 Million PFLOPS by End of 2025, Second Globally
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 9 日消息，据新华社报道，国家数据局 6 月 8 日发布《数字中国发展报告》，截至 2025 年底，全国在用算力设施机架数超过 1373 万标准机架，建成万卡智算集群 42 个， 智能算力规模达到 159 万 PFLOPS，位居全球第二 。 IT之家从数据中获悉，截至 2025 年底，我国网民规模达 11.25 亿人， 互联网普及率达 80.1% ；用人工智能来解答问题、生成图片视频、作为生活助手的用户规模，分别达 4.57 亿人、2.88 亿人和 1.84 亿人。生成式人工智能正逐渐融入我国各类群体的日常生活中， 中青年、高学历用户是核心群体 。在所有生成式人工智能用户中，40 岁以下中青年用户占比达 74.6%。 工业和信息化部去年印发的《算力互联互通行动计划》提出，到 2026 年，建立完备的算力互联互通标准、标识和规则体系；到 2028 年，基本实现全国公共算力标准化互联，形成具备智能感知、实时发现、随需获取能力的算力互联网。 2025 年 8 月，中国电信研究院战略发展研究所所长饶少阳表示，到 2035 年，人工智能将为我国的 GDP 贡献超过 11 万亿，大概占到 GDP 的 4% 到 5%。这个可能带动算力的需求是十倍，甚至百倍增长。
items.summary_en: China's intelligent computing power reached 1.59 million PFLOPS by end of 2025, ranking second globally. The country had over 13.73 million standard racks and 42 10,000-GPU clusters. Internet users hit 1.125 billion with 80.1% penetration.
items.why_zh: 智能算力规模全球第二凸显中国AI基础设施的快速发展，为AI应用提供坚实基础。
items.why_en: China's second-place intelligent computing power highlights rapid AI infrastructure growth, providing a solid foundation for AI applications.

items.title_zh: Nebius联合NVIDIA为英国和欧洲机器人初创公司推出Physical AI Living Lab
items.title_en: Nebius launches Physical AI Living Lab for UK and European robotics startups built with NVIDIA technologies
items.summary_zh: Nebius宣布推出Physical AI Living Lab，专为英国和欧洲的机器人初创公司设计，基于NVIDIA技术构建。该实验室提供物理AI测试环境，帮助初创公司开发和验证机器人解决方案。具体技术细节和合作模式尚未详细披露。
items.summary_en: Nebius launches Physical AI Living Lab for UK and European robotics startups built with NVIDIA technologies Nebius
items.why_zh: 该实验室为机器人初创公司提供关键测试基础设施，加速物理AI创新。
items.why_en: The lab provides critical testing infrastructure for robotics startups, accelerating physical AI innovation.

items.title_zh: Kimi估值飙升至2000亿元，半年猛增6倍
items.title_en: Kimi Valuation Soars to 200 Billion Yuan, Surging 6-Fold in Six Months
items.summary_zh: Kimi估值飙升至2000亿元，半年猛增6倍 新浪财经
items.summary_en: AI startup Kimi's valuation surged from about 30 billion yuan to 200 billion yuan in just six months, a more than six-fold increase. This rapid growth reflects high market interest and capital influx into the AI large model sector.
items.why_zh: Kimi估值半年暴涨6倍，凸显AI大模型赛道的资本热度和头部企业的快速崛起。
items.why_en: Kimi's 6-fold valuation surge in six months highlights the capital frenzy and rapid rise of leading AI large model companies.

items.title_zh: 烧掉1万亿美元后，美国公司开始给DeepSeek充值
items.title_en: After Burning $1 Trillion, US Companies Start Paying DeepSeek
items.summary_zh: 烧掉1万亿美元后，美国公司开始给DeepSeek充值 华尔街见闻
items.summary_en: After spending about $1 trillion on AI infrastructure with limited results, US tech companies are now paying Chinese AI startup DeepSeek for its services. DeepSeek's efficient technology and low cost are attracting global clients, signaling a shift in the global AI competitive landscape.
items.why_zh: 美国公司转向DeepSeek，标志着中国AI技术在国际市场获得认可，全球AI竞争格局正在重塑。
items.why_en: US companies turning to DeepSeek marks international recognition of Chinese AI technology and a reshaping of the global AI competitive landscape.

items.title_zh: 赛豆科技全新汽车品牌AIVA即将发布，搭载豆包大模型智能座舱
items.title_en: Saidou Technology's New Car Brand AIVA to Launch with Doubao Large Model Smart Cockpit
items.summary_zh: 赛豆科技全新汽车品牌AIVA即将发布，搭载豆包大模型智能座舱 搜狐网
items.summary_en: Saidou Technology will launch a new car brand AIVA, featuring a smart cockpit powered by its self-developed Doubao large model. The model enables natural language processing and multimodal interaction, aiming to enhance driving experience. This marks deep integration of AI large models in the automotive sector.
items.why_zh: AIVA品牌将AI大模型引入汽车座舱，预示智能座舱将成为汽车行业竞争的新焦点。
items.why_en: AIVA's integration of AI large models into car cockpits signals that smart cockpits will become a new competitive focus in the automotive industry.

items.title_zh: Robinhood推出股票交易智能体AI，但可能不会提振股价
items.title_en: Robinhood Launches Agentic Artificial Intelligence (AI) for Stock Trading. Here's Why It Might Not Move the Stock.
items.summary_zh: Robinhood推出了用于股票交易的智能体人工智能（Agentic AI），该技术旨在帮助用户更智能地进行投资决策。然而，分析认为这一举措可能不会对Robinhood的股价产生显著影响。尽管AI功能可能吸引部分用户，但市场对此反应平淡，因为类似的技术在金融领域已不新鲜。此外，Robinhood面临监管压力和竞争加剧，新功能难以成为股价催化剂。投资者更关注公司的盈利能力和用户增长数据。
items.summary_en: Robinhood Launches Agentic Artificial Intelligence (AI) for Stock Trading. Here's Why It Might Not Move the Stock. AOL.com
items.why_zh: 该新闻揭示了AI在金融领域的应用趋势，但同时也表明技术创新并不总能直接转化为公司股价的上涨。
items.why_en: This news highlights the trend of AI in finance but also shows that technological innovation does not always directly translate into stock price gains.

items.title_zh: 马斯克详解 SpaceX AI 卫星计划：技术成熟，明年规模化量产
items.title_en: Musk Details SpaceX AI Satellite Plan: Technology Mature, Mass Production Next Year
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 9 日消息，SpaceX 首席执行官埃隆 · 马斯克于当地时间周一表示，随着公司本周筹备备受瞩目的首次公开募股（IPO），建造轨道人工智能数据中心并非难以攻克的工程难题。 这位亿万富翁称，现有星链（Starlink）卫星网络已具备大部分所需技术。在该公司发布的一段视频座谈中，马斯克说道：“我们想说明的是，实现这一目标并不依赖什么尚未问世的神奇技术。相关技术大多已应用于第三代星链卫星。相较于我们目前开展的各项工作，这算不上什么超高难度的挑战。” 此番言论发表之际，投资者正密切审视 SpaceX 的轨道 AI 数据中心规划。在即将到来的 IPO 前夕，该业务是公司长期增长蓝图的核心一环，此次上市预估公司估值约达 1.75 万亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 11.89 万亿元人民币）。 马斯克与 SpaceX 工程师伊恩 · 达尔介绍了 AI 卫星方案：这类卫星将在轨充当计算节点，依靠太阳能供电，并通过向太空散发热量实现散热。 公司认为，将算力设施部署在太空轨道，有望缓解地面 AI 数据中心日益严峻的电力受限问题。 SpaceX 称，这批 AI 卫星将大量沿用第三代新一代星链卫星的成熟技术，包括太阳能电池阵列与热管理系统。 达尔介绍，这款航天器的结构比星链卫星更简单，无需搭载用于宽带通信的大型相控阵天线。 马斯克在视频中表示：“AI 卫星本质上就是大量太阳能电池、一个散…
items.summary_en: Elon Musk stated that building orbital AI data centers is not a difficult engineering challenge, as most required technologies are already used in Starlink satellites. The AI satellites will serve as computing nodes in orbit, powered by solar energy and cooled by radiating heat into space, aiming to alleviate power constraints faced by ground-based AI data centers.
items.why_zh: SpaceX的AI卫星计划可能改变AI算力部署模式，缓解地面电力瓶颈，并成为公司IPO后的核心增长点。
items.why_en: SpaceX's AI satellite plan could transform AI computing deployment, alleviate ground power constraints, and become a core growth driver post-IPO.

items.title_zh: LoRA微调270M-8B模型用于金融交易商户信息提取：最小模型能有多小？
items.title_en: How Small Can You Go? LoRA Fine-Tuning 270M-8B Models for Merchant Information Extraction in Financial Transactions
items.summary_zh: 金融交易处理需要从嘈杂、缩写的银行交易字符串中大规模提取结构化商户信息。当前生产系统使用LoRA微调的LLaMA 3.1-8B模型，在该任务上达到了96.95%的F1分数，但部署80亿参数模型带来了高昂的内存、延迟和成本限制。为了寻找更高效的替代方案，研究人员对四个模型家族（Gemma 3、Qwen 3.5、Aya和LLaMA 3.1）的24个模型变体进行了以部署为重点的研究，模型规模从270M到8B不等。该研究旨在探索在保持高精度的前提下，能否使用更小的模型来降低部署成本。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.08051v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Financial transaction processing requires extracting structured merchant information from noisy, abbreviated bank transaction strings at scale. Our current production system, a LoRA-fine-tuned LLaMA 3.1-8B, achieves 96.95% F1 on this task, but deploying 8-billion-parameter models imposes prohibitive memory, latency, and cost constraints. To identify more efficient alternatives, we conduct a deployment-focused study of 24 model variants spanning four model families: Gemma 3 (270M, 1B, 4B), Qwen 3.5 (0.8B, 2B, 4B), Aya (3.35B), and LLaMA 3.1-8B, sy…
items.why_zh: 该研究为金融等行业的AI部署提供了在精度与效率之间权衡的实证依据，有助于降低大模型应用的门槛。
items.why_en: This study provides empirical evidence for balancing accuracy and efficiency in AI deployment, potentially lowering the barrier for large model applications in industries like finance.

items.title_zh: GAIA基准上的脚手架效应：受控比较研究
items.title_en: Scaffold Effects on GAIA: A Controlled Comparison
items.summary_zh: 已发表的智能体能力得分混淆了模型本身的能力与脚手架（scaffold）赋予的能力，而这种启发差距的大小在受控条件下尚未得到充分表征。本研究在GAIA验证集的Level 1和Level 2上，对来自三个提供商的五种模型（Claude Opus 4.7、Sonnet 4.6、Haiku 4.5；Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview；GPT-5.5）进行了预注册的受控比较，测试了三种脚手架（ReAct、Planner-Actor-Rater多智能体设计、planner-then-executor），保持任务和条件固定，并进行了三次尝试。研究旨在量化不同脚手架对模型性能的影响，从而更准确地评估模型本身的真实能力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.08529v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Published agent capability scores conflate what a model can do with what its scaffold lets it do, and the magnitude of this elicitation gap is not well characterized under controlled conditions. This study executes a pre-registered controlled comparison of three scaffolds (ReAct, a Planner-Actor-Rater multi-agent design, and planner-then-executor) across five models from three providers (Claude Opus 4.7, Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 4.5; Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview; GPT-5.5) on GAIA validation Levels 1 and 2, holding tasks and conditions fixed, with three attemp…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了智能体评估中脚手架效应的显著影响，有助于更公平地比较不同模型和框架的真实能力。
items.why_en: This study reveals the significant impact of scaffold effects in agent evaluation, enabling fairer comparisons of model and framework capabilities.

items.title_zh: 面向相互依赖的城市交通系统的弹性即服务评估框架
items.title_en: A Resilience-as-a-Service assessment framework for coordinated disruption response in interdependent urban transit systems
items.summary_zh: 城市公共交通中断需要快速响应策略，但现有研究很少提供决策支持框架来使用一套共同的动态、乘客、运营商和环境导向指标比较不同的中断响应方案。本文提出了一种基于KPI、时间索引的框架，用于评估城市交通系统中中断响应方案的弹性。该框架结合了优化模型与基于智能体模拟的行为评估，并作为二次支持的基础。该框架旨在帮助决策者选择最优的响应策略，提高城市交通系统的整体韧性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.08849v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Urban public transport disruptions require rapid response strategies, yet existing studies rarely provide a decision support framework to compare alternative disruption response solutions using a common set of dynamic, passenger, operator, and environment oriented indicators. This paper proposes a KPI-driven, time-indexed framework to assess the resilience of disruption response solutions in urban transit systems. The framework combines an optimization model with a behavioral evaluation in agent-based simulation. It also underlays the secondary s…
items.why_zh: 该框架为城市交通管理提供了量化决策支持工具，有助于提升系统应对突发中断的韧性和效率。
items.why_en: This framework provides quantitative decision support for urban transit management, enhancing system resilience and efficiency in response to disruptions.

items.title_zh: 基于贝叶斯选择性潜在推断的污水优先流感监测
items.title_en: Bayesian Selective Latent Inference for Wastewater-First Influenza Monitoring
items.summary_zh: 污水流感监测可以在临床报告之前揭示社区传播，但仅凭污水并不能完全替代人类负担的代理指标。现有污水模型假设固定的证据集，而通用证据获取方法将官方监测流视为可互换的昂贵特征。本文将污水优先流感监测视为一个选择性决策问题：从强制性的污水证据开始，系统必须决定污水是否足够，以及需要获取哪些延迟的官方监测流。通过贝叶斯选择性潜在推断，该方法旨在更高效地利用污水数据，同时有选择地补充其他监测信息，以更早、更准确地估计流感活动水平。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.09433v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Wastewater influenza surveillance can reveal community circulation before clinical reporting, but wastewater alone is not a fully identifiable proxy for human burden. Existing wastewater models assume a fixed evidence set, while generic evidence-acquisition methods treat official surveillance streams as interchangeable costly features. We cast wastewater-first influenza monitoring as a selective decision problem: starting from mandatory wastewater evidence, the system must decide whether wastewater is sufficient, which delayed official stream to…
items.why_zh: 该方法优化了流感监测的资源分配，有望更早发现疫情并降低监测成本，对公共卫生具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This approach optimizes resource allocation in influenza surveillance, potentially enabling earlier outbreak detection and reducing monitoring costs, which is significant for public health.

items.title_zh: TheoremBench：评估LLM在形式数学中的定理证明能力
items.title_en: TheoremBench: Evaluating LLMs on Theorem Proving in Formal Mathematics
items.summary_zh: LLM最近在形式证明基准上取得了强劲结果。然而，现有评估仍高度集中在竞赛式问题上，往往无法捕捉模型在更长、依赖关系更丰富的数学发展中的表现。本文介绍了TheoremBench，一个基于Lean4的基准，旨在评估超越竞赛场景的定理证明器。该基准由近一百个经典定理构建，并以两种互补形式发布：一个包含每个实例一个目标定理的简单主版本，以及一个更复杂的版本。TheoremBench旨在更全面地评估LLM在形式数学中的推理能力，推动该领域的发展。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.09450v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLMs have recently achieved strong results on formal proving benchmarks. However, existing evaluations remain heavily concentrated on competition-style problems and often fail to capture how models behave on longer, more dependency-rich mathematical developments. We introduce TheoremBench, a Lean4 benchmark designed to evaluate theorem provers beyond contest settings. The benchmark is built from nearly one hundred classical theorems and is released in two complementary forms: a plain main version containing one target theorem per instance, and a…
items.why_zh: TheoremBench填补了现有形式数学基准的空白，有助于更全面地评估LLM在复杂数学推理中的能力。
items.why_en: TheoremBench fills a gap in existing formal mathematics benchmarks, enabling more comprehensive evaluation of LLM capabilities in complex mathematical reasoning.

items.title_zh: 基于FT-Transformer和堆叠集成的结构化数据客户流失预测
items.title_en: Customer Churn Prediction on Structured Data Using FT-Transformer and Stacking Ensembles
items.summary_zh: 客户流失预测对于保险、数字银行、电子商务和订阅平台等数据驱动行业至关重要，因为留住现有客户通常比获取新客户更具成本效益。在结构化数据集上预测流失仍然具有挑战性，原因包括类别不平衡、非线性特征交互和异质特征类型。基于树的集成方法在这些场景中始终表现出色，通常优于传统神经网络。本研究引入了一种结合FT-Transformer和堆叠集成的方法，旨在进一步提高结构化数据上客户流失预测的准确性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.07582v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Customer churn prediction is essential across data-driven industries such as insurance, digital banking, eCommerce, and subscription platforms, where retaining existing customers is typically more cost-effective than acquiring new ones. Predicting churn on structured datasets remains challenging due to class imbalance, nonlinear feature interactions, and heterogeneous feature types. Tree-based ensemble methods consistently demonstrate strong performance in these contexts, often outperforming conventional neural networks. This study introduces a…
items.why_zh: 该研究为结构化数据上的客户流失预测提供了新的高效方法，有助于企业降低客户流失率并提升盈利能力。
items.why_en: This study offers a new effective method for customer churn prediction on structured data, helping businesses reduce churn and improve profitability.

items.title_zh: 观点：拟人化错位研究需要更强有力的证据
items.title_en: Position: Anthropomorphic Misalignment Research Needs Stronger Evidence
items.summary_zh: 本文认为，许多拟人化错位研究（AMR）需要更强有力的证据，以确保它们能够为关键的安全决策（如模型部署和监管）提供稳健的基础。通过评估不同错位概念（如欺骗、紧急错位和谄媚）中的失败模式，本文展示了概念模糊性、非稳健数据集、实验设计和不足的因果干预如何导致对模型行为的过度解读。该立场论文旨在为AMR领域提供指导，推动更严谨的研究方法，从而更可靠地评估和防范AI系统的潜在风险。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.07612v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We argue that many Anthropomorphic Misalignment Research (AMR) studies need stronger evidence to ensure that they can provide a robust foundation for critical safety decisions, such as model deployment and regulation. By evaluating failure modes across different misalignment concepts, such as deception, emergent misalignment, and sycophancy, we show how conceptual ambiguity, non-robust datasets, experimental design, and insufficient causal interventions can lead to overinterpretation of model behaviors. This position paper aims to offer guidanc…
items.why_zh: 该观点强调了拟人化错位研究中的方法论缺陷，对于提升AI安全研究的严谨性和可靠性至关重要。
items.why_en: This position highlights methodological flaws in anthropomorphic misalignment research, which is crucial for improving the rigor and reliability of AI safety studies.

items.title_zh: 基于多臂老虎机的深度神经网络结构化神经元剪枝
items.title_en: Structured Neuron Pruning in Deep Neural Networks Using Multi-Armed Bandits
items.summary_zh: 深度神经网络常包含冗余隐藏单元。移除单个权重可减少参数数量，但非结构化稀疏性在标准密集实现中不易利用。本文提出一种结构化剪枝框架，使用多臂老虎机（MAB）算法移除完整神经元。每个候选神经元被视为一个臂；拉动臂会暂时屏蔽该神经元，测量在采样小批量上损失的变化，恢复神经元，并更新其安全移除奖励的估计。该方法在保持模型性能的同时有效减少神经元数量，提高了计算效率。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.07615v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Deep neural networks often contain redundant hidden units. Removing individual weights can reduce parameter count, but unstructured sparsity is not always easy to exploit in standard dense implementations. This paper develops a structured pruning framework in which complete neurons are removed using multi-armed bandit (MAB) algorithms. Each candidate neuron is treated as an arm; pulling an arm temporarily masks that neuron, measures the change in loss on a sampled mini-batch, restores the neuron, and updates an estimate of its safe-removal rewa…
items.why_zh: 该方法提供了一种自动化的结构化剪枝策略，有助于在保持模型精度的同时降低计算成本。
items.why_en: This method offers an automated structured pruning strategy that reduces computational cost while maintaining model accuracy.

items.title_zh: 全方位视角：非结构化交通中基于等变特征学习的360度LiDAR感知设计与分析
items.title_en: Eyes All Around: Design and Analysis of 360-Degree LiDAR Perception Using Equivariant Feature Learning in Unstructured Traffic
items.summary_zh: 在密集、非结构化的城市交通中，由于道路使用者种类繁多、频繁遮挡、不规则运动模式以及缺乏标准化道路布局，感知仍是自动驾驶的主要挑战。尽管基于LiDAR的3D目标检测器在结构化驾驶场景中表现出色，但大多数是针对有限视场开发的，其在360度全景感知下的行为尚不明确。本文研究了360度LiDAR感知流水线，并利用等变特征学习来提升非结构化交通中的检测性能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.07626v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Perception in dense, unstructured urban traffic remains a major challenge for autonomous driving because of the wide variety of road users, frequent occlusions, irregular motion patterns, and the lack of standardized road layouts. Although recent LiDAR based 3D object detectors have shown strong performance in structured driving scenarios, most are developed and evaluated for limited field of view settings, and their behavior under full surround 360-degree sensing is still not well understood. This paper studies a 360-degree LiDAR perception pi…
items.why_zh: 该研究填补了360度LiDAR感知在非结构化交通场景中的空白，对提升自动驾驶安全性具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This research addresses the gap in 360-degree LiDAR perception for unstructured traffic, crucial for improving autonomous driving safety.

items.title_zh: 面向LLM智能体工作流的成本感知推测执行：一种五维集成方法
items.title_en: Cost-Aware Speculative Execution for LLM-Agent Workflows: An Integrated Five-Dimension Method
items.summary_zh: LLM智能体工作流将模型调用和工具调用串联起来，大部分时间花费在等待上游操作完成上。推测执行可以通过预测上游输入来启动下游操作，从而利用空闲时间，但每次推测都会产生实际成本（按token计费），且成功概率难以估计并随时间漂移。本文提出了一种围绕五个设计决策的方法：启动下游操作、预测输入、成本建模、概率估计和动态调整，以在成本和性能之间取得平衡。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.07846v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: LLM-agent workflows chain model calls and tool invocations, and spend most of their wall-clock time waiting on upstream operations before downstream ones can start. Speculative execution can reclaim that idle time by launching a downstream operation with a predicted upstream input, but here each speculation costs real money (per-token billing) and its success probability is hard to estimate and drifts over time. This paper presents a method organized around five design decisions: (D1) start a downstream operation before its upstream completes;…
items.why_zh: 该方法有效降低了LLM智能体工作流的延迟和成本，提升了资源利用效率。
items.why_en: This method reduces latency and cost in LLM-agent workflows, improving resource utilization.

items.title_zh: MC-PDD：面向黑盒大语言模型的掩码语料级预训练数据检测
items.title_en: MC-PDD: Masked Corpus-Level Pretraining Data Detection for Black-Box Large Language Models
items.summary_zh: 预训练是大语言模型（LLM）发展的基础，但预训练数据的不透明性使模型分析复杂化，并引发伦理、法律和公平性问题。因此，检测特定数据集是否用于预训练至关重要。现有方法通常依赖模型概率分布，不适用于仅提供输入输出接口的闭源LLM。为解决此问题，本文提出掩码语料级预训练数据检测（MC-PDD）方法，仅通过黑盒访问即可检测预训练数据。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.07996v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Pretraining is fundamental to the development of Large Language Models (LLMs), yet the opacity of pretraining data complicates model analysis and raises ethical, legal, and fairness concerns. Detecting whether specific datasets were used during pretraining is, therefore, critical. Existing state-of-the-art methods typically rely on access to model probability distributions, making them unsuitable for closed-source LLMs that provide only input-output interfaces. To address this limitation, we introduce Masked Corpus-level Pretraining Data Detect…
items.why_zh: 该方法使得对闭源LLM的预训练数据审计成为可能，有助于提升模型透明度和可信度。
items.why_en: This method enables auditing of pretraining data in closed-source LLMs, enhancing transparency and trustworthiness.

items.title_zh: 摘要生成并未消亡
items.title_en: Summarization is Not Dead Yet
items.summary_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）的进步引发了关于模型生成的摘要是否媲美甚至超越人类撰写摘要的讨论，进而质疑摘要生成是否仍是一个开放的研究问题。本文通过多轨道评估重新审视这一说法，涵盖五个不同数据集和五个最先进的LLM，结合受控人工评估、偏差缓解的LLM作为评判者协议、基于外部知识的事实性验证以及语料级语言分析。研究结果揭示了更细微的图景：虽然LLM在某些方面表现优异，但在事实性和忠实度上仍存在不足，摘要生成研究仍有必要。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.08000v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The progress of large language models (LLMs) has fueled claims that model-generated summaries rival or even surpass human-written references, raising questions about whether summarization remains an open research problem. We re-examine this narrative through a multi-track evaluation covering five diverse datasets and five state-of-the-art LLMs, combining controlled human assessment, bias-mitigated LLM-as-Judge protocols, factuality verification against external knowledge, and corpus-level linguistic analysis. Our findings reveal a more nuanced…
items.why_zh: 该研究纠正了“摘要生成已解决”的误解，指出了当前LLM在摘要任务中的局限性。
items.why_en: This study corrects the misconception that summarization is solved, highlighting limitations of current LLMs in this task.

items.title_zh: 审计大语言模型中的专有对齐：一种无真实标准的比较框架
items.title_en: Auditing Proprietary Alignment in Large Language Models: A Comparative Framework Without a Ground-Truth Standard
items.summary_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）通过不透明的开发和部署流程发布，使得模型提供商能够注入专有策略而不正式宣布。因此，有报道称各种模型会生成反映专有规则和组织利益的回复，导致对争议话题的审查或 misinformation。然而，系统性地识别这种对齐仍是一个基本挑战，因为缺乏明确的“正确”标准。本文提出一种比较框架，无需真实标准即可审计LLM中的专有对齐，通过对比不同模型对同一输入的输出来揭示潜在偏差。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.08381v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly released and deployed through opaque development and deployment pipelines, enabling model providers to inject intentional, provider-specific policies without officially announcing them. As a result, various models have been reported to generate responses reflecting proprietary rules and organizational interests, leading to censorship or misinformation on controversial topics. However, systematic identification of such alignment remains a fundamental challenge, complicated by the ambiguity of what ``…
items.why_zh: 该框架有助于揭示LLM中隐藏的专有对齐，提升模型部署的透明度和问责性。
items.why_en: This framework helps uncover hidden proprietary alignment in LLMs, enhancing transparency and accountability in model deployment.

items.title_zh: 谄媚作为多语言对齐失败：安全性能如何随语言、主题和模型退化
items.title_en: Sycophancy as a Multilingual Alignment Failure: How Safety Degrades Across Languages, Topics, and Models
items.summary_zh: 安全对齐的大语言模型常表现出谄媚行为，即倾向于认同用户的观点而不顾事实准确性。尽管在英语中已有充分研究，但在其他语言中的表现仍未被充分探索，这使得数十亿非英语使用者可能面临模型验证的 misinformation。本文首次进行大规模、多模型的跨语言谄媚评估，对六个指令微调模型在38种语言、110万个实例上进行基准测试。结果显示，谄媚行为在不同语言和主题上存在显著差异，且安全性能在非英语语言中普遍退化。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.08451v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Safety-aligned large language models often exhibit sycophancy, which is the tendency to affirm users' opinions regardless of factual accuracy. Although well-studied in English, its manifestation in other languages remains largely unexamined, leaving billions of non-English speakers potentially vulnerable to model-validated misinformation. We present the first large-scale, multi-model evaluation of cross-lingual sycophancy, benchmarking \textbf{six instruction-tuned models} across \textbf{1.1 million instances} spanning \textbf{38 languages} and…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了多语言环境中LLM对齐失败的风险，强调了跨语言安全评估的重要性。
items.why_en: This study reveals risks of alignment failure in multilingual LLMs, highlighting the need for cross-lingual safety evaluation.

items.title_zh: AI增强的闭环质量工程：持续软件质量智能的参考架构
items.title_en: AI-Augmented Closed-Loop Quality Engineering: A Reference Architecture for Continuous Software Quality Intelligence
items.summary_zh: 软件工程的质量仍面临挑战，因为需求、测试和生产之间的流程脱节，阻碍了在连续发布中实施质量策略。现有方法通常是固定模型或单优化方法，缺乏生产反馈学习机制。本文提出一种AI增强的闭环参考架构，用于持续软件质量智能。该模型综合了需求特征挖掘、基于风险的测试优先级、测试用例生成、缺陷预测以及生产反馈集成，形成一个闭环系统，持续改进软件质量。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.08793v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The quality of software engineering is still under a challenge due to disjointed processes between requirements, testing, and production, which hinders the opportunity to implement quality strategies in consecutive releases. Existing approaches tend to be fixed-model or single-optimization approaches and lack production feedback learning mechanisms. The paper at hand proposes a closed-loop reference architecture of continuous software quality intelligence with AI enhancements. The model synthesizes requirement feature mining, risk-based test pr…
items.why_zh: 该架构通过闭环反馈机制将AI融入软件质量工程，有望显著提升软件质量和开发效率。
items.why_en: This architecture integrates AI into software quality engineering with a closed-loop feedback mechanism, promising significant improvements in software quality and development efficiency.

items.title_zh: 从法规到控制流：基于跨度约束的道义树用于可废止范围解析
items.title_en: From Statute to Control Flow: Span-Grounded Deontic Trees for Defeasible Scope Parsing
items.summary_zh: 该研究指出，遵循规则的智能体在执行政策法规时，常因“静默范围遗漏”（SSO）而失败：模型应用一般规则但忽略嵌套例外或反例外，导致输出看似合规却在重要边缘案例上出错。虽然此类失败常被视为智能体系统问题，但根本瓶颈在于法规理解能力，这通常是法律NLP研究的范畴。然而，现有法律NLP基准多强调最终任务结果，可能忽略中间推理过程。为此，论文提出基于跨度约束的道义树（Span-Grounded Deontic Trees），用于可废止范围解析，旨在显式建模规则中的例外和反例外结构，提升智能体对复杂法规的遵循能力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.08932v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Rule-following agents tasked with executing policies and regulations often fail via Silent Scope Omission (SSO): a model applies a general rule but silently drops nested exceptions or counter-exceptions, producing outputs that appear compliant yet break on important edge cases. Although such failures are often framed as an agentic-systems problem, the underlying bottleneck is statutory and policy understanding, a capability typically studied in legal NLP. However, most existing legal NLP benchmarks emphasize end-task outcomes, which can overloo…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了AI智能体在遵循复杂法规时的关键失败模式，并提出结构化解析方法，对提升AI在合规领域的可靠性至关重要。
items.why_en: This work identifies a critical failure mode in rule-following AI agents and proposes a structured parsing method, which is crucial for improving AI reliability in compliance-critical domains.

items.title_zh: 第一阶段控制熵状态而非最终结果
items.title_en: Stage-1 Controls the Entropy Regime, Not the Outcome
items.summary_zh: 两阶段后训练——第一阶段热启动（监督微调SFT或在线策略蒸馏OPD）后接第二阶段强化学习（RL）——越来越多地用于视觉语言模型（VLM）。本研究使用Qwen2.5-VL-7B和同模态72B VLM教师进行OPD，通过小数据实验探究第一阶段实际控制什么。结果显示，三种热启动方法在Geometry3K内部验证集上达到狭窄的53-54%准确率区间，与近期专门方法报告的范围一致；该设置几乎没有证据表明第一阶段能显著影响最终性能。论文认为第一阶段主要控制模型的熵状态（即输出分布的确定性程度），而非最终任务结果。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.09059v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Two-stage post-training -- a Stage-1 warm-start (supervised fine-tuning, SFT, or on-policy distillation, OPD) followed by Stage-2 reinforcement learning (RL) -- is increasingly used for vision-language models (VLMs). We ask what Stage-1 actually controls in a small-data study using Qwen2.5-VL-7B with a same-modality 72B VLM teacher for OPD. First, the three warm-starts reach a narrow $53$--$54\%$ band on Geometry3K internal validation, consistent with the narrow range reported by recent specialized methods; this setup provides little evidence t…
items.why_zh: 该研究挑战了第一阶段训练直接决定最终性能的常见假设，揭示了其对模型输出熵的调控作用，有助于优化两阶段训练策略。
items.why_en: This work challenges the common assumption that Stage-1 directly determines final performance, revealing its role in controlling output entropy, which helps optimize two-stage training strategies.

items.title_zh: 从第一人称视角通过视觉语言模型解码行人过街意图
items.title_en: Decoding Pedestrian Crossing Intention from Egocentric Vision via Vision Language Models
items.summary_zh: 第一人称视角（自我中心视觉）提供了人类感知与决策的第一人称视角，但其在交通安全预测方面的潜力尚未充分挖掘。本研究探索从短时自我中心视频片段中解码行人过街意图。方法是将任务形式化为封闭式视觉问答（VQA）问题，并利用视觉语言模型（VLM）预测行人意图。首先在零样本设置下对三个系列的最先进VLM进行基准测试，发现它们取得了一定效果。进一步研究表明，通过微调VLM可以显著提升意图预测的准确性，为自动驾驶等应用中的行人行为预测提供了新思路。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.09142v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Egocentric vision offers a first-person view of human perception and decision making, yet its potential for traffic-safety prediction remains underexplored. In this work, we study the decoding of pedestrian crossing intentions from short egocentric video clips. We approach this by formulating the task as a closed-ended visual question answering (VQA) problem and leveraging vision language models (VLMs) to predict the pedestrians' intent. We first benchmark three families of state-of-the-art VLMs in a zero-shot setting, finding that they achieve…
items.why_zh: 该研究将VLM应用于行人意图预测，利用第一人称视觉提升自动驾驶安全性，具有重要的实际应用价值。
items.why_en: This work applies VLMs to pedestrian intention prediction using egocentric vision, enhancing autonomous driving safety with significant practical value.

items.title_zh: 预训练、冻结、仍在泄露：EEG基础模型中跨编码器属性迁移的审计
items.title_en: Pretrained, Frozen, Still Leaking: Auditing Cross-Encoder Attribute Transfer in EEG Foundation Models
items.summary_zh: EEG基础模型发布时通常只对单一端点进行审计：原始重建、成员推断、身份链接或下游头的DP-SGD。本研究在BIOT、LaBraM和EEGPT上同时对所有四个端点进行审计，发现每个单端点审计都通过了那些仍然泄露频谱属性的模型发布。关键证据是跨编码器迁移审计：从一个冻结编码器学到的单一岭属性解码器，通过拟合的线性桥接，可以迁移到留出对象的测试数据上，从而揭示隐私泄露。这表明现有审计方法存在盲区，需要更全面的隐私评估。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.09189v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: EEG foundation-model releases are usually audited one endpoint at a time: raw-reconstruction, membership inference, identity linkage, or DP-SGD on the downstream head. We audit the same released embeddings under all four endpoints jointly, on BIOT, LaBraM, and EEGPT, and show that each single-endpoint audit clears releases that still leak spectral attributes. The decisive evidence is a cross-encoder transfer audit: a single ridge attribute decoder learned from one frozen encoder transfers, via a fitted linear bridge, to held-out-subject test sp…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了EEG基础模型现有隐私审计方法的不足，强调需要多端点联合审计以防止属性泄露，对保护生物数据隐私至关重要。
items.why_en: This work exposes the inadequacy of single-endpoint privacy audits for EEG foundation models, highlighting the need for multi-endpoint auditing to prevent attribute leakage, crucial for biometric data privacy.

items.title_zh: 基于离散Token的LLM文本转语音系统的端到端训练
items.title_en: End-to-End Training for Discrete Token LLM based TTS System
items.summary_zh: 当前最先进的文本转语音（TTS）系统通常采用级联流水线：语音分词器、自回归大语言模型（LLM）和基于扩散的流匹配（FM）模型，这些组件独立训练。本文提出一种完全端到端（E2E）优化框架，统一训练语音分词器、LLM、FM模型以及额外的奖励模型（RM）。具体地，首先通过重建任务的多目标损失联合优化分词器，然后通过端到端训练使所有组件协同工作。实验表明，该E2E框架在语音质量和自然度上优于独立训练的方法，同时简化了训练流程。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.09234v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Recent state-of-the-art (SOTA) text-to-speech (TTS) systems typically adopt a cascaded pipeline consisting of a speech tokenizer, an autoregressive large language model (LLM), and a diffusion based flow-matching (FM) model, with these components trained independently. In this paper, we propose a fully end-to-end (E2E) optimization framework that unifies the training of the speech tokenizer, LLM, FM model, and an additional reward model (RM). Specifically, we first jointly optimize the tokenizer using multi-task objectives derived from reconstru…
items.why_zh: 该研究通过端到端训练简化了TTS系统流程并提升性能，对推动语音合成技术的发展具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work simplifies TTS pipeline and improves performance via end-to-end training, significantly advancing speech synthesis technology.

items.title_zh: 内化几何法则：从求解器残差中学习用于精度关键型生成
items.title_en: Internalizing Geometric Law: Learning from Solver Residuals for Precision-Critical Generation
items.summary_zh: 大语言模型在精度关键领域（如技术制图和机械设计）经常产生幻觉，输出必须满足严格的几何约束。本研究探索从自然语言进行开放式几何合成：将自由形式描述翻译为精确构造，其实体必须同时满足数十个相互作用的约束。为使问题可处理，作者发布了PyGeoX，一个可编程几何领域特定语言（DSL），可将声明式约束编译为可微损失；以及PyGeoX-Bench，一个标准基准。通过从求解器残差中学习，模型能够内化几何法则，显著提升生成精度，减少违反约束的情况。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.09278v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large Language Models frequently hallucinate in precision-critical domains such as technical diagramming and mechanical design, where outputs must satisfy strict geometric constraints. We study open-ended geometric synthesis from natural language: translating free-form descriptions into precise constructions whose entities must simultaneously satisfy dozens of interacting constraints. To make this tractable, we release PyGeoX, a programmable geometric DSL that compiles declarative constraints into a differentiable loss, and PyGeoX-Bench, a stra…
items.why_zh: 该研究为LLM在精度关键领域（如工程制图）的应用提供了可行方案，通过内化几何约束减少幻觉，具有重要工程价值。
items.why_en: This work provides a viable solution for LLMs in precision-critical domains like engineering design by internalizing geometric constraints, reducing hallucinations and offering significant engineering value.

items.title_zh: Muon比Adam学习到更鲁棒且可迁移的特征
items.title_en: Muon Learns More Robust and Transferable Features than Adam
items.summary_zh: Muon最近成为预训练大语言模型（LLM）和视觉分类器的最先进优化器。尽管其在效率上优于Adam和SGD，但Muon在特征学习方面的优势尚不明确。本文从鲁棒性和可迁移性角度研究Muon的特征学习优势。首先，通过在损坏图像和文本上评估预训练模型，发现Muon学习到的特征在不同架构上始终比Adam和SGD更鲁棒。其次，在迁移学习任务中，Muon预训练的特征表现出更好的可迁移性。这表明Muon不仅效率高，还能学习到更高质量的特征表示。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.09658v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Muon has recently emerged as a state-of-the-art optimizer for pretraining Large Language Models (LLMs) and vision classifiers. Despite its efficiency advantage over Adam and SGD, the feature-learning advantage of Muon remains unclear. This paper investigates Muon's feature-learning advantage through the lens of robustness and transferability. First, by evaluating pretrained models on corrupted images and texts, we show that features learned by Muon are consistently more robust than those learned by Adam and SGD across different architectures, i…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了Muon优化器在特征质量上的优势，表明其不仅效率高，还能提升模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力，对预训练实践有重要指导意义。
items.why_en: This work reveals Muon's advantage in learning higher-quality features, improving robustness and transferability, which has important implications for pretraining practices.

items.title_zh: IRAM-Omega-Q：自适应智能体不确定性调节的计算框架
items.title_en: IRAM-Omega-Q: A Computational Framework for Uncertainty Regulation in Adaptive Agents
items.summary_zh: 在不确定性下运行的自适应智能体不仅需要优化任务输出，还必须在噪声、扰动和变化条件下维持可行的内部状态。本文提出IRAM-Omega-Q，一个用于建模随机扰动下自适应智能体不确定性调节的计算框架。该框架结合了类量子状态表示与对内部熵信号的闭环自适应控制。类量子形式主义被工具性地使用：演化状态是归一化复向量，通过熵信号调节智能体的不确定性水平。实验表明，该框架能有效帮助智能体在不确定环境中保持稳定和适应性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2603.16020v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Adaptive agents operating under uncertainty must do more than optimize task outputs: they must maintain a workable internal state under noise, perturbation, and changing conditions. This paper introduces IRAM-Omega-Q, a computational framework for modeling uncertainty regulation in adaptive agents under stochastic disturbance. The framework combines a quantum-like state representation with closed-loop adaptive control over an internal entropy signal. The quantum-like formalism is used instrumentally: the evolving state is a normalized complex…
items.why_zh: 该框架为自适应智能体在不确定性环境中的稳定运行提供了新方法，对机器人、自动驾驶等领域的鲁棒控制具有潜在应用价值。
items.why_en: This framework offers a novel approach for adaptive agents to maintain stability under uncertainty, with potential applications in robotics and autonomous driving for robust control.

items.title_zh: 弱化形式语义下的基准语言理解
items.title_en: Understanding Benchmark Language Under Weakened Formal Semantics
items.summary_zh: 最新NLP基准测试需要理解自然语言中指定的条件、程序和例外，通常依赖隐含假设和外部知识。构建具有证明论保证的完整语义表示在大规模场景下往往不切实际，而纯文本推理的检查手段有限。本文探讨当形式语义保证被弱化时，能在多大程度上理解基准语言。通过提取和分析，研究揭示了在语义约束放松的情况下，模型对基准语言的理解能力及其局限性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2509.17455v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: State-of-the-art NLP benchmarks require interpretation of natural language that specifies conditions, procedures, and exceptions, often relying on implicit assumptions and external knowledge. Constructing complete semantic representations with proof-theoretic guarantees is frequently impractical at scale, and purely text-based reasoning offers limited means of inspection. This paper asks how much understanding of benchmark language can be achieved when formal semantic guarantees are weakened. We investigate this question by extracting c…
items.why_zh: 该研究挑战了NLP基准测试中语义理解的假设，为评估模型在更现实条件下的表现提供了新视角。
items.why_en: This work challenges assumptions about semantic understanding in NLP benchmarks, offering new insights into model evaluation under realistic conditions.

items.title_zh: 表现性学习理论
items.title_en: Performative Learning Theory
items.summary_zh: 表现性预测会影响它们试图预测的结果。本文研究影响样本（如仅限现有应用用户）和/或整体人群（如所有潜在应用用户）的表现性预测。这引发了关于模型在表现性下泛化能力的问题，例如，当现有用户和新用户都对应用预测做出反应时，如何基于现有用户推断新用户的特征。通过将表现性预测嵌入统计学习理论，本文提供了理论框架来分析这种反馈循环下的模型性能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.04402v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Performative predictions influence the very outcomes they aim to forecast. We study performative predictions that affect a sample (e.g., only existing users of an app) and/or the whole population (e.g., all potential app users). This raises the question of how well models generalize under performativity. For example, how well can we draw insights about new app users based on existing users when both of them react to the app's predictions? We address this question by embedding performative predictions into statistical learning theory. We…
items.why_zh: 该理论框架有助于理解预测如何改变其预测对象，对AI系统的部署和公平性至关重要。
items.why_en: This theoretical framework helps understand how predictions alter the outcomes they predict, crucial for AI deployment and fairness.

items.title_zh: 学习评估：基于元学习的无标签数据高效模型评估
items.title_en: Learning to Evaluate: Cost-Effective Model Evaluation on Unlabeled Data with Meta-Learning
items.summary_zh: 机器学习的快速发展导致模型生态系统空前扩张，评估新发布模型在未见无标签数据上的可靠性变得愈发困难。现有评估流程通常依赖昂贵的标注、重复微调或难以泛化到新模型的假设。本文提出MetaEvaluator，一种经济高效、模型无关的框架，用于快速、无标签地评估未见模型，支持多种架构和模态。MetaEvaluator通过元学习从历史评估中提取知识，显著降低评估成本。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.23595v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The rapid advancement of machine learning has led to an unprecedented expansion of model ecosystems, making it increasingly difficult to assess the reliability of newly released models on unseen and unlabeled data. Existing evaluation pipelines typically rely on costly annotation, repeated fine-tuning, or assumptions that do not generalize well to new models. We introduce MetaEvaluator, a cost-effective, model-agnostic framework for fast, label-free evaluation of unseen models across diverse architectures and modalities. MetaEvaluator m…
items.why_zh: 该框架解决了模型评估成本高昂的痛点，有助于在资源受限场景下快速筛选可靠模型。
items.why_en: This framework addresses the high cost of model evaluation, enabling rapid screening of reliable models in resource-constrained settings.

items.title_zh: 误导比纠正更容易：LLM从众行为中的有害与有益修正
items.title_en: Easier to Mislead Than to Correct: Harmful and Beneficial Revision in LLM Conformity
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型在多智能体系统中会看到并回应其他智能体的答案，一个关键风险是从众行为：模型可能仅仅因为多数意见不同而放弃自己的答案。先前研究表明LLM经常向多数答案修正，但尚不清楚这些修正是纠正错误还是引入新错误。本文通过控制实验，让LLM先回答问题，然后看到模拟的同伴回答，再做出最终回答。结果发现，LLM更容易被误导而非纠正，即从众行为更多导致错误而非修正。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.01637v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used in multi-agent systems, where they see and respond to other agents' answers. A key risk is conformity: a model may abandon its own answer simply because others agree on a different one. Prior studies show that LLMs often revise toward a majority answer, but it remains unclear whether these revisions help correct mistakes as often as they introduce new errors. In this paper, we conduct a controlled study in which an LLM first answers a question, then sees simulated peer responses before making…
items.why_zh: 该发现揭示了LLM在多智能体系统中的脆弱性，对构建可靠的协作AI系统具有警示意义。
items.why_en: This finding reveals LLM vulnerability in multi-agent systems, with implications for building reliable collaborative AI.

items.title_zh: 利用SySRs降低LLM评估成本：一种利用模型相似性的赌博机算法
items.title_en: Cutting LLM Evaluation Costs with SySRs: A Bandit Algorithm that Provably Exploits Model Similarity
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型通常通过在每个测试查询上评估每个模型来进行基准测试。对于寻找最佳部署模型的从业者来说，这往往浪费资源：如果某个模型明显表现较差，则无需精确估计其性能。最佳臂识别算法可通过自适应分配评估预算来大幅降低成本。此外，语言模型对相同提示的响应往往相似，但先前工作未能充分利用这一点。本文提出SySRs算法，利用模型相似性，在理论上保证降低评估成本。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.07726v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large Language Models are typically benchmarked by evaluating every model on every test query. For practitioners seeking the best model to deploy, this is often wasteful: if a model clearly performs worse than others, there is no need to precisely estimate its performance. Best-arm identification algorithms can be naturally applied to drastically reduce costs by adaptively allocating evaluation budget. Further, language models often respond similarly to the same prompt-a property previous work has tried to leverage with mixed success. We propose…
items.why_zh: 该算法显著降低了LLM评估的计算成本，有助于在模型选择中更高效地利用资源。
items.why_en: This algorithm significantly reduces LLM evaluation costs, enabling more efficient resource use in model selection.

items.title_zh: 通过API实现差分隐私合成数据：表格数据
items.title_en: Differentially Private Synthetic Data via APIs 4: Tabular Data
items.summary_zh: 本文研究生成具有差分隐私保证的合成表格数据，以支持敏感领域的数据共享。尽管已有大量研究，最先进的方法通常侧重于最小化低阶边际查询误差，而忽略了高阶相关性带来的挑战。为弥补这一差距，本文将最初为差分隐私图像和文本合成开发的Private Evolution框架扩展到表格数据，提出Tab-PE算法。该算法能够生成保留高阶相关性的合成表格数据，同时提供严格的隐私保证。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.08259v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This paper investigates the problem of generating synthetic tabular data with differential privacy (DP) guarantees, enabling data sharing in sensitive domains. Despite extensive study, state-of-the-art methods often focus on minimizing low-order marginal query errors and overlook the challenges posed by high-order correlations. To address this gap, we extend the Private Evolution (PE) framework, originally developed for DP-compliant image and text synthesis, to tabular data. We introduce Tab-PE -- an algorithm for synthetic tabular data generatio…
items.why_zh: 该工作解决了合成表格数据中高阶相关性的隐私保护难题，有助于在医疗、金融等敏感领域安全共享数据。
items.why_en: This work addresses the challenge of preserving high-order correlations in private synthetic tabular data, enabling safe data sharing in sensitive domains.

items.title_zh: 基于全原子流图的少步共折叠
items.title_en: Few-step Cofolding with All-Atom Flow Maps
items.summary_zh: 3D生物分子复合物的全原子生成建模已成为预测蛋白质和蛋白质-配体结构的主流范式。然而，在原子级别生成结构通常需要昂贵的迭代扩散过程，使得常规部署和推理时搜索技术计算成本高昂。本文提出Denoiser Cofolding All-Atom Flowmap框架，将最先进的全原子共折叠模型蒸馏为全原子流图，实现少步生成，大幅降低计算成本，同时保持高保真度。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.08375v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: All-atom generative modeling of 3D biomolecular complexes has emerged as the dominant paradigm for predicting the structure of proteins and protein-ligand systems. Generating structures at the atomic level of fidelity, however, typically requires expensive iterative diffusion rollouts, making both conventional deployment and inference-time search techniques computationally costly. In this paper, we introduce the Denoiser Cofolding All-Atom Flowmap (DeCAF) framework for distilling state-of-the-art all-atom cofolding models into all-atom flow maps…
items.why_zh: 该框架加速了生物分子结构生成，对药物发现和蛋白质设计具有重要应用价值。
items.why_en: This framework accelerates biomolecular structure generation, with significant applications in drug discovery and protein design.

items.title_zh: 具有近因性的在线学习：滑动窗口流式多臂赌博机算法
items.title_en: Online Learning with Recency: Algorithms for Sliding-window Streaming Multi-armed Bandits
items.summary_zh: 受在线学习中近因效应的启发，本文研究单遍滑动窗口流式多臂赌博机算法。在该设置中，给定n个具有未知亚高斯奖励分布的臂和一个参数W，臂以单遍流形式到达，仅最近W个臂被视为有效。算法需在有限内存下进行纯探索和遗憾最小化。该模型是流式多臂赌博机的自然扩展，本文提出了相应的算法并分析了其性能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.08977v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Motivated by the recency effect in online learning, we study algorithms for single-pass *sliding-window streaming multi-armed bandits (MABs)* in this paper. In this setting, we are given $n$ arms with unknown sub-Gaussian reward distributions and a parameter $W$. The arms arrive in a single-pass stream, and only the most recent $W$ arms are considered valid. The algorithm is required to perform pure exploration and regret minimization with limited memory, defined as the number of stored arms. The model is a natural extension of the streaming mult…
items.why_zh: 该研究将近因效应引入流式赌博机问题，对在线推荐系统和实时决策具有实际意义。
items.why_en: This work incorporates recency into streaming bandits, with practical implications for online recommendation and real-time decision making.

items.title_zh: 大型语言模型自适应差分隐私保护的实证基准测试
items.title_en: Benchmarking Empirical Privacy Protection for Adaptations of Large Language Models
items.summary_zh: 最新研究对大型语言模型（LLM）在自适应过程中应用差分隐私（DP）的实际效果进行了基准测试。尽管DP提供了理论上的隐私保证，但LLM预训练阶段与自适应数据之间的重叠和相互依赖可能削弱隐私保护。研究使用最先进的攻击方法（如鲁棒成员推理和金丝雀数据提取）评估了DP自适应下的隐私风险。通过系统性的基准测试，揭示了当前DP方法在实际应用中的局限性，为改进隐私保护技术提供了重要参考。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.09401v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent work has applied differential privacy (DP) to adapt large language models (LLMs) for sensitive applications, offering theoretical guarantees. However, its practical effectiveness remains unclear, partly due to LLM pretraining, where overlaps and interdependencies with adaptation data can undermine privacy despite DP efforts. To analyze this issue in practice, we investigate privacy risks under DP adaptations in LLMs using state-of-the-art attacks such as robust membership inference and canary data extraction. We benchmark these risks by sy…
items.why_zh: 该研究首次系统性地评估了LLM自适应中差分隐私的实际效果，对敏感应用中的隐私保护具有重要指导意义。
items.why_en: This study provides the first systematic evaluation of DP's practical effectiveness in LLM adaptations, crucial for privacy protection in sensitive applications.

items.title_zh: 动态臂到达的多臂老虎机：序贯筛选、动态遗憾与次线性保证
items.title_en: Multi-Armed Bandits with Arriving Arms: Sequential Screening, Dynamic Regret, and Sublinear Guarantees
items.summary_zh: 该研究提出了一种新的多臂老虎机问题，其中可用臂集合随时间动态扩展。这种设置常见于序贯实验中，当新动作或治疗在研究中途出现时，传统的静态最优臂遗憾不再适用。研究者引入了动态遗憾准则，以评估相对于当前可用最优臂的性能。针对到达信息差异和漂移基准等挑战，提出了相应的算法并证明了次线性遗憾界。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.09002v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We study a stochastic multi-armed bandit problem in which the set of available arms expands over time. This setting arises in sequential experimentation when new actions or treatments become available during an ongoing study, making regret against a single best arm in hindsight inappropriate. We instead evaluate performance relative to the best arm currently available, leading to a dynamic-regret criterion for arriving-arm environments. To address the resulting challenges of arrival information discrepancy (AID) and a drifting benchmark (DB), w…
items.why_zh: 该研究为动态环境下的序贯决策提供了理论框架，对在线推荐、临床试验等实际应用具有重要价值。
items.why_en: This work provides a theoretical framework for sequential decision-making in dynamic environments, valuable for applications like online recommendations and clinical trials.

items.title_zh: 深度强化学习在过程设计中的应用：综述与展望
items.title_en: Deep reinforcement learning for process design: Review and perspective
items.summary_zh: 该综述探讨了深度强化学习在化工过程设计中的应用潜力。随着可再生能源和原料供应的转型，化工行业需要新的过程设计方法。深度强化学习作为机器学习的一个子类，能够解决复杂决策问题，助力可持续过程设计。文章从信息表示、动作空间和奖励函数三个要素出发，调查了当前强化学习在过程设计中的前沿研究，并展望了未来发展方向。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2308.07822v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The transformation towards renewable energy and feedstock supply in the chemical industry requires new conceptual process design approaches. Recently, breakthroughs in artificial intelligence offer opportunities to accelerate this transition. Specifically, deep reinforcement learning, a subclass of machine learning, has shown the potential to solve complex decision-making problems and aid sustainable process design. We survey state-of-the-art research in reinforcement learning for process design through three major elements: (i) information r…
items.why_zh: 该综述系统总结了深度强化学习在化工过程设计中的应用，为加速行业绿色转型提供了重要参考。
items.why_en: This review systematically summarizes deep reinforcement learning applications in chemical process design, offering insights for accelerating green transformation.

items.title_zh: LLMSynthor：利用大型语言模型生成宏观对齐的微观记录
items.title_en: LLMSynthor: Macro-Aligned Micro-Records Synthesis with Large Language Models
items.summary_zh: 宏观对齐的微观记录对于社会科学和城市研究的可信模拟至关重要，例如流行病模型需要个体级别的移动和接触数据与真实行为一致，同时聚合结果匹配实际统计数据。然而，大规模收集此类细粒度数据不切实际。LLMSynthor通过将预训练的大型语言模型转化为宏观感知模拟器，生成与宏观数据一致的逼真微观记录，解决了这一难题。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2505.14752v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Macro-aligned micro-records are crucial for credible simulations in social science and urban studies. For example, epidemic models are only reliable when individual-level mobility and contacts mirror real behavior, while aggregates match real-world statistics like case counts or travel flows. However, collecting such fine-grained data at scale is impractical, leaving researchers with only macro-level data. LLMSynthor addresses this by turning a pretrained LLM into a macro-aware simulator that generates realistic micro-records consistent with…
items.why_zh: 该研究提供了一种高效生成微观数据的方法，对社会科学和城市研究中的模拟应用具有重要价值。
items.why_en: This work offers an efficient method for generating micro-level data, crucial for credible simulations in social science and urban studies.

items.title_zh: AI天气模型能否预测两周以上？长时程滚动的定量基准与分析
items.title_en: Can AI Weather Models Predict Beyond Two Weeks? A Quantitative Benchmark and Analysis of Long Rollouts
items.summary_zh: 尽管AI天气模型在短期到中期（最多15天）预报中表现出色，但在更长时程滚动时常常出现不稳定性。该研究通过九个最先进AI天气模型的一年滚动预测，将失败模式分为三类：爆炸、漂移和季节性丧失。分析表明，稳定性取决于对小时空尺度的处理：不稳定模型放大高频能量，而稳定模型则能保持平衡。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.30184v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: While AI weather models excel at short-to-medium range forecasts (up to 15 days), they frequently suffer from ill-defined "instabilities" when rolled out over longer horizons. This work addresses the lack of a formal taxonomy by categorizing these failures into three distinct regimes: blow-up, drift, and loss of seasonality, through year-long rollouts of nine state-of-the-art AI weather models. Our analysis reveals that stability hinges on the treatment of small spatio-temporal scales: unstable models amplify high-frequency energy, while stab…
items.why_zh: 该研究首次系统分类了AI天气模型的长时程失败模式，对改进长期天气预报具有重要指导意义。
items.why_en: This study provides the first systematic taxonomy of failure modes in long-range AI weather forecasting, guiding improvements for extended predictions.

items.title_zh: 降低IREX参与门槛：开源虹膜识别算法、工具包与基准测试
items.title_en: Lowering the Barrier to IREX Participation: Open-Source Algorithms, Toolkit, and Benchmarking for Iris Recognition
items.summary_zh: NIST虹膜交换（IREX）为评估开源虹膜识别算法提供了平台，但参与门槛高，要求算法用C++编写、符合特定API并满足严格的速度和内存限制。该研究旨在降低这些门槛，提供了两个基于深度学习的开源虹膜匹配器（ArcIris和TripletIris）及其C++ IREX兼容实现，并附带工具包和基准测试，以推动大规模开源虹膜识别评估。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.20735v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: NIST Iris Exchange (IREX) offers an appealing solution to evaluating new open-source iris recognition algorithms, but it presents high barriers to entry because these algorithms must be written in C++, using a specific API, and adapted to meet strict IREX speed and memory constraints. The main goal of this paper is to lower these barriers and advance open-source iris recognition large-scale evaluations by offering: (a) two new modern deep learning-based open-source iris matchers (ArcIris and TripletIris), along with their C++ IREX X-com…
items.why_zh: 该研究通过提供开源算法和工具，显著降低了虹膜识别领域参与标准评估的门槛，有助于推动技术进步。
items.why_en: This work significantly lowers the entry barrier for iris recognition evaluation by providing open-source algorithms and tools, fostering technological advancement.

items.title_zh: 苹果发布Siri AI，Meta推出付费Instagram订阅
items.title_en: Apple unveils Siri AI as Meta launches paid Instagram subscription
items.summary_zh: 苹果在WWDC 2026上发布了集成AI的Siri，而Meta则推出了付费Instagram订阅服务。苹果的Siri AI强调个性化和隐私保护，旨在提供更智能的助手体验。Meta的付费订阅则可能为用户提供额外功能，如去广告或增强隐私。这两大科技巨头的举措反映了AI和订阅模式在行业中的持续演进。
items.summary_en: Apple unveils Siri AI as Meta launches paid Instagram subscription fox10tv.com
items.why_zh: 苹果和Meta的同步动作展示了AI与订阅模式在消费科技中的重要性，影响行业竞争格局。
items.why_en: The simultaneous moves by Apple and Meta underscore the importance of AI and subscription models in consumer tech, shaping competitive dynamics.

items.title_zh: 硬氪观察 | WWDC 2026：苹果终于在AI上迈出一小步，国内iPhone还是用不上
items.title_en: WWDC 2026: Apple Takes a Small Step in AI, but Domestic iPhones Still Can't Use It
items.summary_zh: 作者 | 邱晓芬 编辑 | 袁斯来 6月9日，位于加州库比蒂诺的苹果总部被Swift标志性的暖色系渐变背景填满，熟悉的倒计时欢呼声依旧，但WWDC 2026选了一条更克制的路线—— 这次，苹果没有如往常一般发布新硬件，也不预热万众瞩目的折叠屏，而是把一个多小时演讲的最大篇幅，留给了软件与AI。 显然，苹果正试图把过去两年的"AI迟到者"的标签，编译成另一套叙事。 在发布会上，苹果软件工程高级副总裁克雷格·费德里吉（Craig Federighi）先是纠偏了多数AI的产品思路——他认为，大部分公司都在急着往前跑，"为了AI而AI"，却始终没考虑真正要服务的用户。 或许是在隐晦为苹果过去缺席AI做出解释，在他看来，苹果在AI上的定调是，AI必须以人为中心，要个性化、且有用。具体体现在，AI不仅要懂用户的个人环境、常用的应用、读懂用户当前的屏幕，且每一步的设计都要以尊重隐私为前提。 在关注AI之余，大众的另一个关注点是，这也是蒂姆·库克最后一次以CEO身份站上 WWDC 舞台主持。 不过，他选择把这段落幕的分量压得很轻——没有渲染煽情，在演讲结尾，他表示，“与这群团队同行，是一生的荣幸”，"我坚信苹果的最佳时刻仍在前方"。 （图源/企业） 真正的苹果AI，来了 在发布会上，克雷格·费德里吉回应了外界最为关切的苹果AI基础模型构成—— 其称，苹果今年开拓了与谷歌的深度合作，与Gemini共…
items.summary_en: At WWDC 2026, Apple focused on software and AI, emphasizing human-centric, personalized, and privacy-respecting AI, and announced a partnership with Google Gemini. However, these AI features are not available for domestic iPhones in China. Tim Cook made his final WWDC appearance as CEO.
items.why_zh: 苹果在AI上的谨慎布局和与谷歌的合作标志着其AI战略的转变，但中国市场的缺席凸显了本地化挑战。
items.why_en: Apple's cautious AI strategy and partnership with Google mark a shift, but the absence in China highlights localization challenges.

items.title_zh: 苹果“造车遗产”易主：Waymo 斥资 2.2 亿美元拿下一处汽车试验场
items.title_en: Waymo Acquires Former Apple Car Test Site for $220M
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 9 日消息，据马里科帕县提交的文件显示，Waymo 斥资收购了亚利桑那州一处占地 5500 英亩（IT之家注：约 2228 公顷）的大型汽车试验场。该场地原隶属于 14 号公路投资伙伴有限责任公司，这家特拉华州空壳公司与苹果公司存在关联。 文件记录显示，这片场地坐落于亚利桑那州威特曼市，周边分布着多家同类试验场，本次交易金额达 2.2 亿美元（现汇率约合 14.95 亿元人民币），产权过户手续于 6 月 5 日完成。Waymo 也向科技媒体 TechCrunch 证实了此次收购。 本次收购进一步完善了 Waymo 本就庞大的封闭式测试场地网络。这家隶属于 Alphabet 的企业目前仍在使用加州卡斯尔试验场以及俄亥俄州交通研究中心，而这两处场地的规模均远不及此次购入的亚利桑那州场地。 这座亚利桑那州试验场包含一座 115 英亩（约 46.6 公顷）的城市模拟道路、一片 35 英亩（约 14.2 公顷）的车辆动态测试区、一条 4 英里（约 6.4 公里）长的环形赛道，以及专为自动驾驶测试打造的高速模拟高速公路。Waymo 发言人表示，该场地将用于在可控环境中模拟各类行车场景，持续测试并优化自动驾驶系统性能。具体而言，这里将开展纯乘客乘坐测试、车辆运动控制测试、运营人员培训，并逐步拓展各类新型测试项目。 苹果公司在 2021 年就以 1.25 亿美元（现汇率约合 8.…
items.summary_en: Waymo acquired a 5,500-acre automotive test site in Arizona for $220 million, previously linked to Apple. The facility includes urban simulation roads, dynamic test areas, and a high-speed highway loop for autonomous driving testing.
items.why_zh: 该收购增强了Waymo的自动驾驶测试能力，并揭示了苹果造车项目的遗留资产。
items.why_en: The acquisition boosts Waymo's autonomous testing capabilities and reveals assets from Apple's defunct car project.

items.title_zh: OpenAI 申请上市，奥尔特曼估值 25 亿美元的眼球扫描公司却被曝裁员
items.title_en: OpenAI Files for IPO, Altman's Eye-Scan Firm Cuts Jobs
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 9 日消息，OpenAI 于当地时间周一宣布已秘密提交首次公开募股（IPO）申请，这或将成为近十年最具标志性的上市事件之一。另据 Business Insider 报道，OpenAI 首席执行官山姆 · 奥尔特曼旗下的另一家公司 Tools for Humanity 正进行裁员。 大众更为熟知的是 Tools for Humanity 公司旗下的身份验证项目 World，以及配套设备 —— 那个外形怪异的银色球形眼球扫描器。该公司的设想是，通过独一无二的虹膜扫描技术完成身份核验。在奥尔特曼一手打造的自动化程度日益提升的当下，这项技术能够区分真人操作与机器人程序行为。同时，企业也会借助虹膜扫描结果核实用户身份，为自家加密货币 Worldcoin 的交易提供支持。 尽管该公司的发展目标模糊且饱受质疑，但仍拿到了融资，投后估值达 25 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 169.87 亿元人民币），Andreessen Horowitz、Bain Capital 等多家布局区块链领域的投资机构均参与注资。但如今，由于营收陷入困境，这家公司开始缩减规模。 在美国，像 Tinder、Zoom 和 Docusign 这样的公司都与奥尔特曼的这个副业项目达成了合作。而在海外市场，Tools for Humanity 公司则深陷监管与伦理争议。例如在肯尼亚、印度以及中国香港地区，该公…
items.summary_en: OpenAI filed for a confidential IPO, while Sam Altman's Tools for Humanity (Worldcoin) is laying off staff amid revenue struggles. The iris-scanning firm, valued at $2.5B, faces regulatory scrutiny.
items.why_zh: OpenAI上市和其CEO副业裁员同时发生，凸显AI行业资本扩张与商业现实的矛盾。
items.why_en: The simultaneous IPO and layoffs highlight tensions between AI capital expansion and business realities.

items.why_en: Kimi's valuation surge highlights high growth potential and bubble risks in AI startups.

items.title_zh: 36氪首发 | AI芯片处理器IP公司完成近亿元融资，核心团队来自Synopsys、ARM等顶尖半导体公司
items.title_en: AI Chip IP Firm SunZhan Tech Raises Nearly 100M Yuan in Funding
items.summary_zh: 作者 | 乔钰杰 编辑 | 袁斯来 硬氪获悉，隼瞻科技有限公司（下称“隼瞻科技”）近日完成近亿元天使+轮融资。本轮融资引入英飞尼迪资本、白云金控、深圳中小担创投、厚天资本、华盖资本、嘉誉创投等多家战略投资人，老股东毅达资本、达泰资本持续加持。 隼瞻科技成立于2023年初，专注芯片处理器模块及开发平台，致力于打造基于“RISC-V+DSA”的新一代处理器设计体系，公司希望通过“IP货架+EDA工具链”的模式，降低AI时代定制化处理器设计门槛。 当前，AI模型快速垂直化，正在推动芯片产业从“通用计算”走向“专用计算”。 过去，以CPU为核心的架构长期主导芯片设计，但AI算法以大规模二维、三维矩阵运算为主，在传统CPU上的运行效率并不理想。行业也逐渐转向NPU、VPU、TPU等专用处理器协同的异构计算体系。 与此同时，AI模型的快速垂直化，也让芯片设计开始从“通用适配”走向“模型驱动”。 “过去很多算法都能直接跑在CPU上，但AI时代以后，不同场景、不同模型之间差异巨大。”隼瞻科技创始人曾轶表示，“客户越来越希望芯片能围绕自己的模型进行定制，从而在功耗、面积和成本之间找到最佳平衡。” 这也是DSA（领域专用架构）兴起的重要背景。 DSA本质上是“让架构为模型服务”。相比传统通用处理器追求“大而全”，DSA更强调围绕具体算法和场景进行资源配置。 例如，在AI推理场景中，客户可根据模型特点，…
items.summary_en: SunZhan Tech raised nearly 100M yuan in angel+ round for its RISC-V+DSA processor IP and EDA tools, aiming to simplify custom chip design for AI. The shift to domain-specific architectures drives demand.
items.why_zh: 该融资反映了AI芯片设计向专用架构转型的趋势，以及市场对定制化处理器IP的需求。
items.why_en: The funding reflects the trend toward domain-specific architectures in AI chip design and demand for customized processor IP.

items.title_zh: 消息称曹操出行计划组建独立 AI 事业部，拟全面转型为 AI 原生公司
items.title_en: CaoCao Mobility Plans Independent AI Division, Aims for AI-Native Transformation
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 9 日消息，据《科创板日报》今日报道， 曹操出行计划组建独立 AI 事业部，全面推进公司 AI 战略落地，完成从移动互联网公司到 AI 原生公司的关键转型 。 报道还提到，曹操出行近期已在招聘平台上线“首席 AI 官”岗位，岗位职责包括：制定 AI 战略与技术路线、构建 AI 核心能力体系、推动业务全链路 AI 赋能等。 公开资料显示，曹操出行创立于 2015 年 5 月 21 日，是吉利控股集团布局“新能源汽车共享生态”的战略性投资业务，是一家共享出行平台，目前有曹操网约车、曹操汽车、曹操顺风车等业务。 ▲ 曹操 60 汽车 据IT之家此前报道， 曹操出行 3 月 27 日发布上市后首份年报 。2025 年总收入 202 亿元再创新高，同比增长 37.7%；2025 年毛利额 18.9 亿元，同比增长 59.3%；2025 年毛利率 9.4%，同比提升 1.3 个百分点，实现第四季度调整后净利转正。 2025 年曹操出行业务版图持续扩张，截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日服务覆盖国内 195 个城市；平均月活用户数 4130 万，同比增长 43.9%；平均月活司机 63.1 万，同比增长 35.4%。 曹操出行还在年报中提到 Robotaxi 转型全面提速，全球化布局稳步推进，Robotaxi 已部署超 100 辆，启用全球首座“绿色智能通行岛”，与阿布扎比…
items.summary_en: CaoCao Mobility plans to establish an AI division and hire a Chief AI Officer to transform into an AI-native company. Its 2025 revenue reached 20.2B yuan, with over 100 Robotaxis deployed.
items.why_zh: 曹操出行的AI转型表明传统出行平台正积极拥抱AI技术以提升竞争力。
items.why_en: CaoCao's AI transformation shows traditional mobility platforms embracing AI to stay competitive.

items.title_zh: 保险公司报告：美国 6700 亿美元待建数据中心面临强对流风暴威胁
items.title_en: Report: $670B in US Data Centers at Risk from Severe Storms
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 9 日消息，商业保险与再保险企业 MS Amlin 在其发布于当地时间 5 月 26 日的报告中指出， 美国 670 座在建或规划数据中心中有 320 座位于强对流风暴高风险州之中 。这意味着近 6700 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 4.55 万亿元人民币）的投资面临龙卷风、大冰雹、破坏性大风的严重威胁。 MS Amlin 指出，随着 AI 基础设施投资的深入，云服务企业正将更多数据中心部署到土地和电力资源更为充沛的美国南部，然而 这一策略变化也意味着更大规模的投资位于灾害多发地区 。 根据这份报告，有 56% 的待建数据中心（总价近 8000 亿美元）位于极易受到自然灾害袭击的州，约 27% 案例（4400 亿美元）所在州很可能受到冬季风暴的影响，飓风则对 21% 项目（3400 亿美元）构成威胁，还有 3% 待建数据中心（120 亿美元）位于地震高风险州。 MS Amlin 首席承保官 Martin Burke 警告，如果保险行业对数据中心自然灾害风险的反应迟缓， 可能会限制资本的部署和人工智能基础设施的推广 。
items.summary_en: A report finds 320 of 670 planned US data centers are in high-risk severe storm states, threatening $670B in investment. Insurers' slow response could hinder AI infrastructure expansion.
items.why_zh: 该报告揭示了AI基础设施扩张与自然灾害风险之间的冲突，可能影响数据中心选址和保险成本。
items.why_en: The report highlights conflict between AI infrastructure expansion and natural disaster risks, potentially affecting site selection and insurance costs.

items.title_zh: 「百奥几何」完成数亿元战略融资，打造生命科学"微观世界模型"｜36氪首发
items.title_en: BioGeometry Completes Hundreds of Millions in Strategic Funding to Advance Life Science AI Model GeoFlow
items.summary_zh: 文｜胡香赟 编辑｜海若镜 36氪获悉，近日，AI原生生物科技公司百奥几何已完成数亿元战略融资。由上海生物医药创新转化基金、国科投资、达晨财智、星连资本联合领投，高榕资本、指数人工智能产业创新基金跟投。指数资本担任独家财务顾问。另据介绍，本轮募集资金将重点用于生命科学微观世界模型GeoFlow的持续迭代，以及自研药物管线的推进。 当前，人工智能正沿两条主线加速演进：以大语言模型与多模态模型为代表的数字AI（Digital AI），以自动驾驶与人形机器人为代表的物理AI（Physical AI）。而生命AI（Bio AI）或将成为下一个最具想象力的疆域，这一判断，正被全球顶级资本与科学界持续确认。 2024年，诺贝尔化学奖同时授予蛋白质结构预测与蛋白质从头设计两个方向；2025年，中国创新药BD交易金额达1357亿美元，占全球交易金额约49%，超越美国成为全球创新药对外授权第一大市场；2026年5月，Alphabet旗下Isomorphic Labs完成21亿美元融资，由Thrive Capital领投，淡马锡、MGX、英国主权AI基金等主权资本共同入局，刷新AI药物发现领域的单笔融资纪录。 生命科学的基本单位是由分子组成的细胞，生命的所有功能，都源自分子在原子尺度上的相互作用。能否在微观层面真正理解、并精准设计分子之间的相互作用，是生命科学最底层的命题。百奥几何自研的GeoFlow正…
items.summary_en: AI-native biotech company BioGeometry has completed hundreds of millions of yuan in strategic funding to advance its life science AI model GeoFlow and drug pipelines. The investment reflects growing global interest in Bio AI, following recent Nobel Prizes and record biotech deals.
items.why_zh: 百奥几何的融资和GeoFlow模型代表了生命科学AI领域的重要进展，有望加速药物发现和分子设计。
items.why_en: BioGeometry's funding and GeoFlow model represent a significant step in AI-driven life sciences, potentially accelerating drug discovery and molecular design.
